The meeting points of the longer diagonals and the exact
middle points of the squares should be considered as Vulnerable Points,
which a wise astrologer ought not to hurt.
[Actually the word Vamsa means Miagonar, but the author
uses the word here in a wider sense i.e. they stand even for the
minor lines connecting a few pairs of squares as explained in verse
63 infra. In addition to the two main diagonals there are four minor
ones. These six bring about nine points of intersection. These minor
diagonals are called Raj jus. Bhaffotpala seems to have written a
work on architecture entitled wherefrom he quotes here
two verses :
TtTOR %^S!I ptSRH I
